_instructions: Copy this file, rename to {condition-slug}.json, and fill in all fields. Use {state} as placeholder for state name. See asthma-refills-online.json for a complete example.

eligibility.introText: You are likely eligible for a TeleDirectMD video visit if ALL of these are true:
eligible: You are 18 years old or older
You are physically located in {state} at the time of the visit
Insurance is not required. A self pay option is available.
eligibility.notEligibleDisclaimer: If you have red-flag symptoms, seek urgent in-person care or emergency care immediately. TeleDirectMD is not an emergency service.

items.question: Can I get CONDITION treatment online in {state}?
How much does an online CONDITION visit cost in {state}?
items.answer: TeleDirectMD offers a transparent self pay option starting at $49 for an adult video visit in {state}. Insurance is not required.

items.question: Does {state} allow telemedicine for this kind of visit?
items.answer: Yes. {state} allows licensed professionals to provide telemedicine within their scope when appropriate and according to accepted standards of care.

items.question: Can TeleDirectMD provide CONDITION care in other states?
items.answer: Yes. TeleDirectMD offers adult evaluations via video visits across multiple states. You must be physically located in the state where you are requesting care at the time of the visit.

bottomCta.title: Need help today?
bottomCta.text: Insurance is not required. Adult-only video visits. MD-only care. Safety-first triage and clear next steps.

paragraphs: TeleDirectMD provides MD-only virtual urgent care for adults (18+) in {state}. CONDITION-SPECIFIC disclaimer text. Insurance is not required. You must be physically located in {state} at the time of your video visit. TeleDirectMD does not prescribe controlled substances.
TeleDirectMD is not an emergency service and is not a replacement for urgent in-person care. CONDITION-SPECIFIC scope limitation.

cityBlock.title: Adults We Serve Across {state}
cityBlock.text: TeleDirectMD evaluates adults located throughout {state}, including {citiesExtended}. Whether you are searching for online CONDITION treatment in {city1}, CONDITION care in {city2}, or CONDITION help anywhere else in {state}, the same telehealth eligibility and safety rules apply.
